messages.content:
```python
client = OpenAI(
    api_key="empty",
    base_url="http://180.184.148.170:8000/v1",
)
```
帮我写一个curl试一下

```bash
curl -X POST http://180.184.148.170:8000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer empty" \
  -d '{
    "model": "gpt-3.5-turbo",
    "messages": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": "Hello, how are you?"
      }
    ]
  }'
```

如果你想测试其他端点，也可以试试这些：

**测试模型列表：**
```bash
curl http://180.184.148.170:8000/v1/models \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer empty"
```

**测试流式响应：**
```bash
curl -X POST http://180.184.148.170:8000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer empty" \
  -d '{
    "model": "gpt-3.5-turbo",
    "messages": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": "Tell me a joke"
      }
    ],
    "stream": true
  }'
```

**简单测试连接：**
```bash
curl -I http://180.184.148.170:8000/v1/models
```

根据你的实际需求选择合适的命令测试即可！
